AllowedOrigins: <update your local dev frontend origin (http) here, e.g. http://localhost:5173>
<update your local dev frontend origin (https) here, e.g. https://localhost:5173>
<update your deployed portal base URL here, e.g. https://myportal.azurewebsites.net>
<update your CIAM native auth host URL here, e.g. https://login.mydomain.com>

Saml.ServiceProviderEntityId: <update your SAML service provider entity ID URL here, e.g. https://myportal.azurewebsites.net/samlapp>
Saml.AssertionConsumerServiceUrl: <update your SAML assertion consumer service (ACS) URL here, e.g. https://myportal.azurewebsites.net/samlapp/acs>
Saml.MetadataUrl: <update your identity provider federation metadata URL here, e.g. https://mytenant.ciamlogin.com/<tenant-id>/federationmetadata/2007-06/federationmetadata.xml?appid=<app-id>>

PortalLogon.TenantSubdomain: <update your CIAM tenant subdomain here, e.g. contoso>
PortalLogon.NativeAuthHost: <custom domain for your CIAM native auth host, e.g. login.mydomain.com>
PortalLogon.TenantId: <tenant ID of your CIAM tenant, e.g. 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc>
PortalLogon.OboClientId: <client ID of your CIAM app registration for the on-behalf-of flow, e.g. 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc>
PortalLogon.OboScope: <scope for your CIAM app registration for the on-behalf-of flow, e.g. api://12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc/.default>
PortalLogon.OboTokenUrl: <update your OAuth2 on-behalf-of token endpoint URL here, e.g. https://login.mydomain.com/<tenant-id>/oauth2/v2.0/token>
PortalLogon.AcsUrl: <update your SAML assertion consumer service (ACS) URL here, e.g. https://myportal.azurewebsites.net/samlapp/acs>
